wall_fidelity.evidence: 35 walls extruded (consensus.walls = 35); shell_stats_from_python.slivers_removed = 0; gates_self_check.plan_shell_group_exists = true; gates_self_check.wall_shell_is_single_group = true. Top render shows continuous L-shaped external shell; side-by-side confirms outline matches planta_74.pdf footprint. No protruding stubs, no broken wall segments.

door_fidelity.evidence: 7 DoorLeaf_Group in geometry_report (matches consensus.openings kind=interior_door count = 7). All groups have bbox z_min ~ 0 (no floating door — heuristic check confirmed). Top render shows door swing arcs at each opening; iso confirms doors anchored to wall hosts. No 'porta solta' detected.

window_fidelity.evidence: 4 WindowGlass_Group in geometry_report (matches consensus.openings kind=window count = 4 — PR #195 invariant pinned). Each height_m = 1.2 (in expected range [0.9, 1.5]); peitoril (sill) preserved below and verga (lintel) preserved above per FP-024. Iso render visibly shows 4 partial-height apertures in right facade with wall mass above and below — NO full-height window void. 1 GlazedBalcony_Group at height 2.7m (full-height porta-vidro, routed via 2D carve path, NOT counted as window — kind_v5 disjoint sets verified by tests/test_window_aperture_contract.py).

room_fidelity.evidence: 8 Floor_Group present vs 11 semantic ambients labelled in planta de vendas. Two cells fuse open-plan ambients with NO wall trace between them in the PDF: r001 = 'A.S. | TERRACO SOCIAL | TERRACO TECNICO'; r002 = 'SALA DE JANTAR | SALA DE ESTAR'. Honest baseline (lessons_learned.md #4); inventing walls to hit 11 cells would violate Hard Rule #1 (No invented geometry). Labels preserved with `|` separator. Promotion to PASS requires semantic_zones overlay tool (backlog item).

scale_rotation.evidence: Inline review of side_by_side_pdf_vs_skp.png: rectangular L-footprint axis-aligned matches PDF outline (TERRACO SOCIAL extending south, COZINHA NW corner, SUITE 01 NE area, SUITE 02 / BANHO 02 / LAVABO arrangement). bbox_m of PlanShell_Group = approx 17.7m x 10.5m, consistent with planta_74.pdf declared total 74.93m^2. 0 deg rotation (no skew). Proportions match between PDF and SKP top column.

global_visual.evidence: Inline review of model_top.png + model_iso.png + side_by_side composite (Claude Code, 2026-05-29T04:18Z): apartamento habitavel recognizable; no floating geometry; no orphan glass panels; no misplaced soft barriers; no obvious wall stubs; no floor leaks; openings well-placed; soft_barriers at parapet height visible along terrace edges; glazed_balcony tall on west facade; door swings shown for each doorway. Architectural plausibility matches the baseline canonical at artifacts/planta_74/. Closely matches FP-030 example 'good_real_baseline'.

findings.evidence: sb007 (25-vertex polyline wrapping BANHO 02 perimeter into SUITE 02 border) renders correctly at peitoril height (1.10m). PDF planta_74.pdf does NOT carry an explicit PEITORIL/MURETA H=X.XXM label in this area. Likely interpretations: (a) continuation of the terrace parapet wrapping the BANHO 02 wall; (b) shower enclosure half-wall; (c) vanity counter. Architecturally plausible but not source-confirmed.
findings.source_check: fixtures/planta_74/consensus_with_human_walls_and_soft_barriers.json soft_barriers[id=sb007] (human_annotation); cross-check vs planta_74.pdf around BANHO 02 area.
findings.proposed_fix: Ask human annotator to confirm. Do NOT delete without confirmation (Hard Rule #1).

findings.evidence: Degenerate SoftBarrier_Group with footprint 0.01m^2 (19cm x 4cm slice). Not visible in renders at the current camera distance. NOT a builder bug per Hard Rule #1 (sliver could be a legitimate thin element).
findings.proposed_fix: Document as finding only. Do NOT implement min-footprint filter — threshold is policy choice. Revisit via FP-031 only if it becomes visually relevant.

verified_passes.evidence: sb005 (17-vertex L-polyline from south TERRACO TECNICO at y=15.96 up to north edge of SUITE 02/SALA DE ESTAR at y=20.55, x=7.5-10.5). PDF planta_74.pdf explicitly labels PEITORIL H=1,10M in this region. Group_5 height_m=1.10 matches exactly. CONFIRMED real architectural element.

review_method.qualitative_inline_review: Claude Code 4.7 (1M context) read model_top.png + model_iso.png + side_by_side_pdf_vs_skp.png via Read tool 2026-05-29T04:18Z. Promoted scale_rotation and global_visual from auto-WARN to PASS based on inline inspection vs PDF.

review_method.side_by_side_generation: Generated ad-hoc via PIL + pypdfium2 (not by a proper tools/compose_side_by_side.py — that tool is follow-up #2 in plans/next_actions.md). Composition: PDF page 1 cropped to floor plan area | SKP top render | SKP iso render. 245KB, 2284x660 px.

top_level_verdict_justification: WARN — top-level reflects the known room_fidelity baseline (8 cells vs 11 ambients open-plan) plus 2 wall_fidelity WARN findings (sb007 ambiguous, sb_sliver Group_1). All structural and visual checks PASS. No FAIL detected.
